members.name: _CanExport
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified [param preset] is valid and can be exported. Use [method set_config_error] and [method set_config_missing_templates] to set error details. Usual implementations call [method _has_valid_export_configuration] and [method _has_valid_project_configuration] to determine if exporting is possible.

members.name: _Cleanup
members.summary: Called by the editor before platform is unregistered.

members.name: _ExportPack
members.signature: public int _ExportPack(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Creates a PCK archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset]. This method is called when "Export PCK/ZIP" button is pressed in the export dialog, with "Export as Patch" disabled, and PCK is selected as a file type.

members.name: _ExportPackPatch
members.signature: public int _ExportPackPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, PackedStringArray patches, int flags)
members.summary: Creates a patch PCK archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset], containing only the files that have changed since the last patch. This method is called when "Export PCK/ZIP" button is pressed in the export dialog, with "Export as Patch" enabled, and PCK is selected as a file type. [b]Note:[/b] The patches provided in [param patches] have already been loaded when this method is called and are merely provided as context. When empty the patches defined in the export preset have been loaded instead.

members.name: _ExportProject
members.signature: public int _ExportProject(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Creates a full project at [param path] for the specified [param preset]. This method is called when "Export" button is pressed in the export dialog. This method implementation can call [method EditorExportPlatform.save_pack] or [method EditorExportPlatform.save_zip] to use default PCK/ZIP export process, or calls [method EditorExportPlatform.export_project_files] and implement custom callback for processing each exported file.

members.name: _ExportZip
members.signature: public int _ExportZip(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, int flags)
members.summary: Create a ZIP archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset]. This method is called when "Export PCK/ZIP" button is pressed in the export dialog, with "Export as Patch" disabled, and ZIP is selected as a file type.

members.name: _ExportZipPatch
members.signature: public int _ExportZipPatch(EditorExportPreset preset, bool debug, String path, PackedStringArray patches, int flags)
members.summary: Create a ZIP archive at [param path] for the specified [param preset], containing only the files that have changed since the last patch. This method is called when "Export PCK/ZIP" button is pressed in the export dialog, with "Export as Patch" enabled, and ZIP is selected as a file type. [b]Note:[/b] The patches provided in [param patches] have already been loaded when this method is called and are merely provided as context. When empty the patches defined in the export preset have been loaded instead.

members.name: _GetBinaryExtensions
members.summary: Returns array of supported binary extensions for the full project export.

members.name: _GetDebugProtocol
members.summary: Returns protocol used for remote debugging. Default implementation return [code]tcp://[/code].

members.name: _GetDeviceArchitecture
members.summary: Returns device architecture for one-click deploy.

members.name: _GetExportOptionVisibility
members.summary: Validates [param option] and returns visibility for the specified [param preset]. Default implementation return [code]true[/code] for all options.

members.name: _GetExportOptionWarning
members.summary: Validates [param option] and returns warning message for the specified [param preset]. Default implementation return empty string for all options.

members.name: _GetExportOptions
members.summary: Returns a property list, as an [Array] of dictionaries. Each [Dictionary] must at least contain the [code]name: StringName[/code] and [code]type: Variant.Type[/code] entries. Additionally, the following keys are supported: - [code]hint: PropertyHint[/code] - [code]hint_string: String[/code] - [code]usage: PropertyUsageFlags[/code] - [code]class_name: StringName[/code] - [code]default_value: Variant[/code], default value of the property. - [code]update_visibility: bool[/code], if set to [code]true[/code], [method _get_export_option_visibility] is called for each property when this property is changed. - [code]required: bool[/code], if set to [code]true[/code], this property warnings are critical, and should be resolved to make export possible. This value is a hint for the [method _has_valid_export_configuration] implementation, and not used by the engine directly. See also [method Object._get_property_list].

members.name: _GetLogo
members.summary: Returns the platform logo displayed in the export dialog. The logo should be 32×32 pixels, adjusted for the current editor scale (see [method EditorInterface.get_editor_scale]).

members.name: _GetName
members.summary: Returns export platform name.

members.name: _GetOptionIcon
members.summary: Returns the item icon for the specified [param device] in the one-click deploy menu. The icon should be 16×16 pixels, adjusted for the current editor scale (see [method EditorInterface.get_editor_scale]).

members.name: _GetOptionLabel
members.summary: Returns one-click deploy menu item label for the specified [param device].

members.name: _GetOptionTooltip
members.summary: Returns one-click deploy menu item tooltip for the specified [param device].

members.name: _GetOptionsCount
members.summary: Returns the number of devices (or other options) available in the one-click deploy menu.

members.name: _GetOptionsTooltip
members.summary: Returns tooltip of the one-click deploy menu button.

members.name: _GetOsName
members.summary: Returns target OS name.

members.name: _GetPlatformFeatures
members.summary: Returns array of platform specific features.

members.name: _GetPresetFeatures
members.summary: Returns array of platform specific features for the specified [param preset].

members.name: _GetRunIcon
members.summary: Returns the icon of the one-click deploy menu button. The icon should be 16×16 pixels, adjusted for the current editor scale (see [method EditorInterface.get_editor_scale]).

members.name: _HasValidExportConfiguration
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if export configuration is valid.

members.name: _HasValidProjectConfiguration
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if project configuration is valid.

members.name: _Initialize
members.summary: Initializes the plugin. Called by the editor when platform is registered.

members.name: _IsExecutable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if specified file is a valid executable (native executable or script) for the target platform.

members.name: _PollExport
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if one-click deploy options are changed and editor interface should be updated.

members.name: _Run
members.signature: public int _Run(EditorExportPreset preset, int device, int debugFlags)
members.summary: This method is called when [param device] one-click deploy menu option is selected. Implementation should export project to a temporary location, upload and run it on the specific [param device], or perform another action associated with the menu item.

members.name: _ShouldUpdateExportOptions
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if export options list is changed and presets should be updated.

members.name: GetConfigError
members.summary: Returns current configuration error message text. This method should be called only from the [method _can_export], [method _has_valid_export_configuration], or [method _has_valid_project_configuration] implementations.

members.name: GetConfigMissingTemplates
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] is export templates are missing from the current configuration. This method should be called only from the [method _can_export], [method _has_valid_export_configuration], or [method _has_valid_project_configuration] implementations.

members.name: SetConfigError
members.summary: Sets current configuration error message text. This method should be called only from the [method _can_export], [method _has_valid_export_configuration], or [method _has_valid_project_configuration] implementations.

members.name: SetConfigMissingTemplates
members.summary: Set to [code]true[/code] is export templates are missing from the current configuration. This method should be called only from the [method _can_export], [method _has_valid_export_configuration], or [method _has_valid_project_configuration] implementations.

Use [method set_config_error] and [method set_config_missing_templates] to set error details.
